TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kalan_dalah, title = Kalan_dalah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalan_dalah} }

S.FORM: = Kalan dalah = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Kalan dalah. 173 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 611 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 92% niqan 560 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 8% niqan 51 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal83%, Amis2%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o4%. ťÉ®ŤźĹŚźćÁ®Ī Hangan alang alang Lun-pi. Tnt eanak alang Ta-tung syang sing-cng cung-sing ksun. Nniqan I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun. Klbangan Kska sipaw narac qsiya ran-yang-si ni kghak qluli lun-pi c-si gqiyan hidaw supu hbun hiya yaa bi 1 m, paah dgiyaq cung-ring mksa hunac hraan hidaw kghak qaqay dgiyaq, kska ran-yang-si ni mstrun sang-sing syang tyan-song-pi yaa bi knbragan na o 120 kung-c. Lnglingay ti-ri Dxgal breenux. Kklaan ppana Kndadax I-ran-s priyux tay-ci-seyn seng-daw, yaa bi smka patas hidaw ka ppanan rulu. Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Alang syusan Teyn-c. Mniq alang seejiq seejiq Tayal. Jilan kari Kari Tayal ,kari Tlu. Snhiyan utux Pnyahan alang Ga I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang ka lun-pi cun, seuxal lun-pi je-se ka hangan na, kari lun ririh dgiyaq ka dungus na, tang dungus na pi, ini dhuq hngkawas 90 alang seejiq Tayal ka kingal ri-s, seejiq alang sbiyaw plalay mniq Taw-yueyn fu-sing syang sdlalih yayung ta-han na i-sing fa-tey chang, yasa baraw mskuy ka dxgal, egu ddgiyaq ni cikuh ka qnpahan, Ming-kow prajing hngkawas, seejiq Tanah Tunux wada klwaan Tay-wan c-ang, tnbunan dha Taw-yueyn-seyn ni I-ran ‚Äďseyn, meiyah sdlalih I-ran-s mniq ran-yang-si hini. Ming-kwo hngkawas 60 idas mataru kndadax song-lwo cun mgkala cun ksun ka lun-pi cun, Ming-kwo hngkawas 66 syang-kung-sywo ni kngkingal ji-kuang paah re-shuey cun phiyu thjil hini, ga pusu syang sing-cng cung-sing ksun. Hngkawas snduray lun-pi se-cyu malu ka qnpahan na qmlahang nkiya kndkilan asi dpun yayung jyo-ryaw-si, mnhdu kmalu qtaan ka muda sipaw hunac qsiya hiya ka sayang, pyahun ka seejiq meiyah msangay rmigaw, smdalih nkiya kndkilan hini. Tru mseupu nniqan ka lun-pi, kiya ka lun-pi, cyang-ring, jyo-ryaw. Kklaan rgrigan Pusu nniqan Ta-tung-syang kung sywo (03)9801004 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang-syang 38 haw Ta-tung syang ri tu-su-kuang (03)9801931 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang-syang 41 haw Ta-tung kwo-syaw ( fu-se yow-c-yueyn) (03)9801276 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang-syang 10-9 haw Tay-ya seng-huow-kuang (03)9802143 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang 60 haw Prawah jiyax 27 idas 3 hngkawas 2007 ka ta-tung syang tay-ya seng-huow-kuang, ruwan o niqan hrpasan kkla quri rmigaw bnatas, sapah pqtaan rpun, sapah pqtaan tnteanak qyqaya, sapah bbrigan gaya qyqaya, pdaun smnalu pnegalang, jyan-paw-s, jyu-chang-cyu, ri-s-kuang-cyu nniqan dnii. Brah nganguc sapah teumal jiyax sngayan lmlamu bbrigan ni muyas grigan kjiyax. Ta-tung syang tnpusu seejiq phiyu wun-wu-kuang, Tayal klgan skuun ka wun-wu, kndusan gaya, seejiq ga spruun qmita ni smku ka gaya Tayal, niqan ka phiyu nan-hay sapah tnpusu seejiq psaun tay-ya sheng-huow-kuang ka kbiyax Tayal. Rwahun patas hidaw " Tgkingal jiyax iyax sngayan bitaq jiyax sngayan maspac patas hidaw bitaq rima babaw ska hidaw. Kipu rhngun " Spatul kbkuy ka kana kipu, empusal kbkuy ka ska kipu. ("Yow-yow yueyn-i -Tay-wan-yueyn-cu-min s-cye cung na pow-wu-kuang"2008, sing-cng-yueyn yueyn-cu-min-cu wey-yueyn-hwey cu-pang) Kuang-kuang ssaan rmigaw Cyo-ryaw-si sapah nkiya kndkilan. Cyo-ryaw-si ga plalay hangan na " Pow-tang-si", ssmikul yayung nkiya kndkilan ka Ta-tung-syang kung sywo nil un-pi se-cyu fa-cang sye-hwey, yayung nii ga ini bi kruciq na, daya yayung niqan dha ka tglaq chu-nyu, mtasaw ni egu bi qsiya yayung, malu nniqan qsurux ku-hua ni si- ke, egu bi che-wu ka ssiyaw ni mtasaw qsiya yayung, tduwa yahun tnsapah mkksa yayung skbiyax hiyi, mrigaw mkksa nganguc, qmlahang nkiya kndkilan ni rmigaw msangay, malu ssaan kuang-kuang rmigaw. Iyux qmlahang yayung qsurux dpun ka cyo-ryaw-si. Yasa sdalih yu-ran cun se-cyu niqan seejiq msa " Yu-ran pu-taw" uri. Tay-ya ta-caw Tay-ya ta-caw plalay hangan na o " Tan-lun ta caw", mlutuc kska hakaw I-ran-seyn sang-sing- syang tan-song-pi ni Ta-tung syang lun-pi cun ka dungus na, kiya ni phiyu hakaw nii pusu dungus, iyux gmrana kmalu ga mniq Ta-tung-syang tnpusu seejiq musa rwo-dong se-cyu, bukuy tay-ya ta- caw kpruhun ka hangan na. Hniygan tay-ya ta- caw sluwan malu qtaan, buji samaw hniygan, rakaw pacing dowriq, prana pusu rakaw niqan embanah, msaas, mgdxgal, niqan bi tnpusu seejiq qtaan. Qtaan bnatas patas ("Yow-yow yueyn-i -Tay-wan-yueyn-cu-min s-cye cung na pow-wu-kuang"2008, sing-cng-yueyn yueyn-cu-min-cu wey-yueyn-hwey cu-pang) Tay-wan pu-row-syun-ci I-ran ryu-yow-wan
S.PHON: = kalan dalańß = gaga mniq jilan tatuŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč kalan dalańß. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, t…ĺuku*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. **** ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč lun-pi. tnt …ôanak alaŇč ta-tuŇč sjaŇč siŇč- ¶Ňč ¶uŇč-siŇč ksun. nniqan i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un. klbaŇčan kska sipaw na…ĺa ¶ qsija …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni kgńßak qluli lun-pi ¶-si gqijan ńßidaw supu ńßbun ńßija jaa bi * m, paańß dgijaq ¶uŇč-…ĺiŇč mksa ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw kgńßak qaqaj dgijaq, kska …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni mst…ĺun saŇč-siŇč sjaŇč tjan-soŇč-pi jaa bi knb…ĺagan na o *** kuŇč- ¶. lŇčliŇčaj ti-…ĺi dxgal b…ĺ…ô…ônux. kklaan ppana kndadax i-…ĺan-s p…ĺijux taj- ¶i-s…ôn s…ôŇč-daw, jaa bi smka patas ńßidaw ka ppanan …ĺulu. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ alaŇč sjusan t…ôn- ¶. mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq s…ô…ô…üiq tajal. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal ,ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan utux pnjańßan alaŇč ga i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč ka lun-pi ¶un, s…ôuxal lun-pi …ü…ô-s…ô ka ńßaŇčan na, ka…ĺi lun …ĺi…ĺińß dgijaq ka duŇčus na, taŇč duŇčus na pi, ini dńßuq ńßŇčkawas ** alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq tajal ka kiŇčal …ĺi-s, s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč sbijaw plalaj mniq taw-ju…ôn *u-siŇč sjaŇč sdlalińß jajuŇč ta-ńßan na i-siŇč *a-t…ô ¶ńßaŇč, jasa ba…ĺaw mskuj ka dxgal, …ôgu ddgijaq ni ¶ikuńß ka qnpańßan, miŇč-kow p…ĺa…üiŇč ńßŇčkawas, s…ô…ô…üiq tanańß tunux wada klwaan taj-wan ¶-aŇč, tnbunan dńßa taw-ju…ôn-s…ôn ni i-…ĺan *s…ôn, m…ôijańß sdlalińß i-…ĺan-s mniq …ĺan-jaŇč-si ńßini. miŇč-kwo ńßŇčkawas ** idas mata…ĺu kndadax soŇč-lwo ¶un mgkala ¶un ksun ka lun-pi ¶un, miŇč-kwo ńßŇčkawas ** sjaŇč-kuŇč-sjwo ni kŇčkiŇčal …üi-kuaŇč paańß …ĺ…ô-sńßu…ô ¶un pńßiju tńß…üil ńßini, ga pusu sjaŇč siŇč- ¶Ňč ¶uŇč-siŇč ksun. ńßŇčkawas sndu…ĺaj lun-pi s…ô- ¶ju malu ka qnpańßan na qmlańßaŇč nkija kndkilan asi dpun jajuŇč …üjo-…ĺjaw-si, mnńßdu kmalu qtaan ka muda sipaw ńßuna ¶ qsija ńßija ka sajaŇč, pjańßun ka s…ô…ô…üiq m…ôijańß msaŇčaj …ĺmigaw, smdalińß nkija kndkilan ńßini. t…ĺu ms…ôupu nniqan ka lun-pi, kija ka lun-pi, ¶jaŇč-…ĺiŇč, …üjo-…ĺjaw. kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan pusu nniqan ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč sjwo (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč-sjaŇč ** ńßaw ta-tuŇč sjaŇč …ĺi tu-su-kuaŇč (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč-sjaŇč ** ńßaw ta-tuŇč kwo-sjaw ( *u-s…ô jow- ¶-ju…ôn) (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč-sjaŇč **-* ńßaw taj-ja s…ôŇč-ńßuow-kuaŇč (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč ** ńßaw p…ĺawańß …üijax ** idas * ńßŇčkawas **** ka ta-tuŇč sjaŇč taj-ja s…ôŇč-ńßuow-kuaŇč, …ĺuwan o niqan ńß…ĺpasan kkla qu…ĺi …ĺmigaw bnatas, sapańß pqtaan …ĺpun, sapańß pqtaan tnt…ôanak qjqaja, sapańß bb…ĺigan gaja qjqaja, pdaun smnalu pn…ôgalaŇč, …üjan-paw-s, …üju- ¶ńßaŇč- ¶ju, …ĺi-s-kuaŇč- ¶ju nniqan dnii. b…ĺańß ŇčaŇču ¶ sapańß t…ôumal …üijax sŇčajan lmlamu bb…ĺigan ni mujas g…ĺigan k…üijax. ta-tuŇč sjaŇč tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq pńßiju wun-wu-kuaŇč, tajal klgan skuun ka wun-wu, kndusan gaja, s…ô…ô…üiq ga sp…ĺuun qmita ni smku ka gaja tajal, niqan ka pńßiju nan-ńßaj sapańß tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq psaun taj-ja sńß…ôŇč-ńßuow-kuaŇč ka kbijax tajal. …ĺwańßun patas ńßidaw " tgkiŇčal …üijax ijax sŇčajan bitaq …üijax sŇčajan maspa ¶ patas ńßidaw bitaq …ĺima babaw ska ńßidaw. kipu …ĺńßŇčun " spatul kbkuj ka kana kipu, …ômpusal kbkuj ka ska kipu. ("jow-jow ju…ôn-i -taj-wan-ju…ôn- ¶u-min s- ¶j…ô ¶uŇč na pow-wu-kuaŇč"****, siŇč- ¶Ňč-ju…ôn ju…ôn- ¶u-min- ¶u w…ô-ju…ôn-ńßw…ô ¶u-paŇč) kuaŇč-kuaŇč ssaan …ĺmigaw ¶jo-…ĺjaw-si sapańß nkija kndkilan. ¶jo-…ĺjaw-si ga plalaj ńßaŇčan na " pow-taŇč-si", ssmikul jajuŇč nkija kndkilan ka ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč sjwo nil un-pi s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč sj…ô-ńßw…ô, jajuŇč nii ga ini bi k…ĺu ¶iq na, daja jajuŇč niqan dńßa ka tglaq ¶ńßu-nju, mtasaw ni …ôgu bi qsija jajuŇč, malu nniqan qsu…ĺux ku-ńßua ni si- k…ô, …ôgu bi ¶ńß…ô-wu ka ssijaw ni mtasaw qsija jajuŇč, tduwa jańßun tnsapańß mkksa jajuŇč skbijax ńßiji, m…ĺigaw mkksa ŇčaŇču ¶, qmlańßaŇč nkija kndkilan ni …ĺmigaw msaŇčaj, malu ssaan kuaŇč-kuaŇč …ĺmigaw. ijux qmlańßaŇč jajuŇč qsu…ĺux dpun ka ¶jo-…ĺjaw-si. jasa sdalińß ju-…ĺan ¶un s…ô- ¶ju niqan s…ô…ô…üiq msa " ju-…ĺan pu-taw" u…ĺi. taj-ja ta- ¶aw taj-ja ta- ¶aw plalaj ńßaŇčan na o " tan-lun ta ¶aw", mlutu ¶ kska ńßakaw i-…ĺan-s…ôn saŇč-siŇč- sjaŇč tan-soŇč-pi ni ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un ka duŇčus na, kija ni pńßiju ńßakaw nii pusu duŇčus, ijux gm…ĺana kmalu ga mniq ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq musa …ĺwo-doŇč s…ô- ¶ju, bukuj taj-ja ta- ¶aw kp…ĺuńßun ka ńßaŇčan na. ńßnijgan taj-ja ta- ¶aw sluwan malu qtaan, bu…üi samaw ńßnijgan, …ĺakaw pa ¶iŇč dow…ĺiq, p…ĺana pusu …ĺakaw niqan …ômbanańß, msaas, mgdxgal, niqan bi tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq qtaan. qtaan bnatas patas ("jow-jow ju…ôn-i -taj-wan-ju…ôn- ¶u-min s- ¶j…ô ¶uŇč na pow-wu-kuaŇč"****, siŇč- ¶Ňč-ju…ôn ju…ôn- ¶u-min- ¶u w…ô-ju…ôn-ńßw…ô ¶u-paŇč) taj-wan pu-…ĺow-sjun- ¶i i-…ĺan …ĺju-jow-wan
S.FORM: = Kalan dalah = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Kalan dalah. 173 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 611 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 92% niqan 560 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 8% niqan 51 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal83%, Amis2%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o4%. ťÉ®ŤźĹŚźćÁ®Ī Hangan alang alang Lun-pi. Tnt eanak alang Ta-tung syang sing-cng cung-sing ksun. Nniqan I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun. Klbangan Kska sipaw narac qsiya ran-yang-si ni kghak qluli lun-pi c-si gqiyan hidaw supu hbun hiya yaa bi 1 m, paah dgiyaq cung-ring mksa hunac hraan hidaw kghak qaqay dgiyaq, kska ran-yang-si ni mstrun sang-sing syang tyan-song-pi yaa bi knbragan na o 120 kung-c. Lnglingay ti-ri Dxgal breenux. Kklaan ppana Kndadax I-ran-s priyux tay-ci-seyn seng-daw, yaa bi smka patas hidaw ka ppanan rulu. Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Alang syusan Teyn-c. Mniq alang seejiq seejiq Tayal. Jilan kari Kari Tayal ,kari Tlu. Snhiyan utux Pnyahan alang Ga I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang ka lun-pi cun, seuxal lun-pi je-se ka hangan na, kari lun ririh dgiyaq ka dungus na, tang dungus na pi, ini dhuq hngkawas 90 alang seejiq Tayal ka kingal ri-s, seejiq alang sbiyaw plalay mniq Taw-yueyn fu-sing syang sdlalih yayung ta-han na i-sing fa-tey chang, yasa baraw mskuy ka dxgal, egu ddgiyaq ni cikuh ka qnpahan, Ming-kow prajing hngkawas, seejiq Tanah Tunux wada klwaan Tay-wan c-ang, tnbunan dha Taw-yueyn-seyn ni I-ran ‚Äďseyn, meiyah sdlalih I-ran-s mniq ran-yang-si hini. Ming-kwo hngkawas 60 idas mataru kndadax song-lwo cun mgkala cun ksun ka lun-pi cun, Ming-kwo hngkawas 66 syang-kung-sywo ni kngkingal ji-kuang paah re-shuey cun phiyu thjil hini, ga pusu syang sing-cng cung-sing ksun. Hngkawas snduray lun-pi se-cyu malu ka qnpahan na qmlahang nkiya kndkilan asi dpun yayung jyo-ryaw-si, mnhdu kmalu qtaan ka muda sipaw hunac qsiya hiya ka sayang, pyahun ka seejiq meiyah msangay rmigaw, smdalih nkiya kndkilan hini. Tru mseupu nniqan ka lun-pi, kiya ka lun-pi, cyang-ring, jyo-ryaw. Kklaan rgrigan Pusu nniqan Ta-tung-syang kung sywo (03)9801004 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang-syang 38 haw Ta-tung syang ri tu-su-kuang (03)9801931 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang-syang 41 haw Ta-tung kwo-syaw ( fu-se yow-c-yueyn) (03)9801276 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang-syang 10-9 haw Tay-ya seng-huow-kuang (03)9802143 (267)I-ran-seyn ta-tung syang lun-pi cun jyaw -yang 60 haw Prawah jiyax 27 idas 3 hngkawas 2007 ka ta-tung syang tay-ya seng-huow-kuang, ruwan o niqan hrpasan kkla quri rmigaw bnatas, sapah pqtaan rpun, sapah pqtaan tnteanak qyqaya, sapah bbrigan gaya qyqaya, pdaun smnalu pnegalang, jyan-paw-s, jyu-chang-cyu, ri-s-kuang-cyu nniqan dnii. Brah nganguc sapah teumal jiyax sngayan lmlamu bbrigan ni muyas grigan kjiyax. Ta-tung syang tnpusu seejiq phiyu wun-wu-kuang, Tayal klgan skuun ka wun-wu, kndusan gaya, seejiq ga spruun qmita ni smku ka gaya Tayal, niqan ka phiyu nan-hay sapah tnpusu seejiq psaun tay-ya sheng-huow-kuang ka kbiyax Tayal. Rwahun patas hidaw " Tgkingal jiyax iyax sngayan bitaq jiyax sngayan maspac patas hidaw bitaq rima babaw ska hidaw. Kipu rhngun " Spatul kbkuy ka kana kipu, empusal kbkuy ka ska kipu. ("Yow-yow yueyn-i -Tay-wan-yueyn-cu-min s-cye cung na pow-wu-kuang"2008, sing-cng-yueyn yueyn-cu-min-cu wey-yueyn-hwey cu-pang) Kuang-kuang ssaan rmigaw Cyo-ryaw-si sapah nkiya kndkilan. Cyo-ryaw-si ga plalay hangan na " Pow-tang-si", ssmikul yayung nkiya kndkilan ka Ta-tung-syang kung sywo nil un-pi se-cyu fa-cang sye-hwey, yayung nii ga ini bi kruciq na, daya yayung niqan dha ka tglaq chu-nyu, mtasaw ni egu bi qsiya yayung, malu nniqan qsurux ku-hua ni si- ke, egu bi che-wu ka ssiyaw ni mtasaw qsiya yayung, tduwa yahun tnsapah mkksa yayung skbiyax hiyi, mrigaw mkksa nganguc, qmlahang nkiya kndkilan ni rmigaw msangay, malu ssaan kuang-kuang rmigaw. Iyux qmlahang yayung qsurux dpun ka cyo-ryaw-si. Yasa sdalih yu-ran cun se-cyu niqan seejiq msa " Yu-ran pu-taw" uri. Tay-ya ta-caw Tay-ya ta-caw plalay hangan na o " Tan-lun ta caw", mlutuc kska hakaw I-ran-seyn sang-sing- syang tan-song-pi ni Ta-tung syang lun-pi cun ka dungus na, kiya ni phiyu hakaw nii pusu dungus, iyux gmrana kmalu ga mniq Ta-tung-syang tnpusu seejiq musa rwo-dong se-cyu, bukuy tay-ya ta- caw kpruhun ka hangan na. Hniygan tay-ya ta- caw sluwan malu qtaan, buji samaw hniygan, rakaw pacing dowriq, prana pusu rakaw niqan embanah, msaas, mgdxgal, niqan bi tnpusu seejiq qtaan. Qtaan bnatas patas ("Yow-yow yueyn-i -Tay-wan-yueyn-cu-min s-cye cung na pow-wu-kuang"2008, sing-cng-yueyn yueyn-cu-min-cu wey-yueyn-hwey cu-pang) Tay-wan pu-row-syun-ci I-ran ryu-yow-wan
S.PHON: = kalan dalańß = gaga mniq jilan tatuŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč kalan dalańß. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, t…ĺuku*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. **** ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč lun-pi. tnt …ôanak alaŇč ta-tuŇč sjaŇč siŇč- ¶Ňč ¶uŇč-siŇč ksun. nniqan i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un. klbaŇčan kska sipaw na…ĺa ¶ qsija …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni kgńßak qluli lun-pi ¶-si gqijan ńßidaw supu ńßbun ńßija jaa bi * m, paańß dgijaq ¶uŇč-…ĺiŇč mksa ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw kgńßak qaqaj dgijaq, kska …ĺan-jaŇč-si ni mst…ĺun saŇč-siŇč sjaŇč tjan-soŇč-pi jaa bi knb…ĺagan na o *** kuŇč- ¶. lŇčliŇčaj ti-…ĺi dxgal b…ĺ…ô…ônux. kklaan ppana kndadax i-…ĺan-s p…ĺijux taj- ¶i-s…ôn s…ôŇč-daw, jaa bi smka patas ńßidaw ka ppanan …ĺulu. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ alaŇč sjusan t…ôn- ¶. mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq s…ô…ô…üiq tajal. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal ,ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan utux pnjańßan alaŇč ga i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč ka lun-pi ¶un, s…ôuxal lun-pi …ü…ô-s…ô ka ńßaŇčan na, ka…ĺi lun …ĺi…ĺińß dgijaq ka duŇčus na, taŇč duŇčus na pi, ini dńßuq ńßŇčkawas ** alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq tajal ka kiŇčal …ĺi-s, s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč sbijaw plalaj mniq taw-ju…ôn *u-siŇč sjaŇč sdlalińß jajuŇč ta-ńßan na i-siŇč *a-t…ô ¶ńßaŇč, jasa ba…ĺaw mskuj ka dxgal, …ôgu ddgijaq ni ¶ikuńß ka qnpańßan, miŇč-kow p…ĺa…üiŇč ńßŇčkawas, s…ô…ô…üiq tanańß tunux wada klwaan taj-wan ¶-aŇč, tnbunan dńßa taw-ju…ôn-s…ôn ni i-…ĺan *s…ôn, m…ôijańß sdlalińß i-…ĺan-s mniq …ĺan-jaŇč-si ńßini. miŇč-kwo ńßŇčkawas ** idas mata…ĺu kndadax soŇč-lwo ¶un mgkala ¶un ksun ka lun-pi ¶un, miŇč-kwo ńßŇčkawas ** sjaŇč-kuŇč-sjwo ni kŇčkiŇčal …üi-kuaŇč paańß …ĺ…ô-sńßu…ô ¶un pńßiju tńß…üil ńßini, ga pusu sjaŇč siŇč- ¶Ňč ¶uŇč-siŇč ksun. ńßŇčkawas sndu…ĺaj lun-pi s…ô- ¶ju malu ka qnpańßan na qmlańßaŇč nkija kndkilan asi dpun jajuŇč …üjo-…ĺjaw-si, mnńßdu kmalu qtaan ka muda sipaw ńßuna ¶ qsija ńßija ka sajaŇč, pjańßun ka s…ô…ô…üiq m…ôijańß msaŇčaj …ĺmigaw, smdalińß nkija kndkilan ńßini. t…ĺu ms…ôupu nniqan ka lun-pi, kija ka lun-pi, ¶jaŇč-…ĺiŇč, …üjo-…ĺjaw. kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan pusu nniqan ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč sjwo (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč-sjaŇč ** ńßaw ta-tuŇč sjaŇč …ĺi tu-su-kuaŇč (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč-sjaŇč ** ńßaw ta-tuŇč kwo-sjaw ( *u-s…ô jow- ¶-ju…ôn) (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč-sjaŇč **-* ńßaw taj-ja s…ôŇč-ńßuow-kuaŇč (**)******* (***)i-…ĺan-s…ôn ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un …üjaw -jaŇč ** ńßaw p…ĺawańß …üijax ** idas * ńßŇčkawas **** ka ta-tuŇč sjaŇč taj-ja s…ôŇč-ńßuow-kuaŇč, …ĺuwan o niqan ńß…ĺpasan kkla qu…ĺi …ĺmigaw bnatas, sapańß pqtaan …ĺpun, sapańß pqtaan tnt…ôanak qjqaja, sapańß bb…ĺigan gaja qjqaja, pdaun smnalu pn…ôgalaŇč, …üjan-paw-s, …üju- ¶ńßaŇč- ¶ju, …ĺi-s-kuaŇč- ¶ju nniqan dnii. b…ĺańß ŇčaŇču ¶ sapańß t…ôumal …üijax sŇčajan lmlamu bb…ĺigan ni mujas g…ĺigan k…üijax. ta-tuŇč sjaŇč tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq pńßiju wun-wu-kuaŇč, tajal klgan skuun ka wun-wu, kndusan gaja, s…ô…ô…üiq ga sp…ĺuun qmita ni smku ka gaja tajal, niqan ka pńßiju nan-ńßaj sapańß tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq psaun taj-ja sńß…ôŇč-ńßuow-kuaŇč ka kbijax tajal. …ĺwańßun patas ńßidaw " tgkiŇčal …üijax ijax sŇčajan bitaq …üijax sŇčajan maspa ¶ patas ńßidaw bitaq …ĺima babaw ska ńßidaw. kipu …ĺńßŇčun " spatul kbkuj ka kana kipu, …ômpusal kbkuj ka ska kipu. ("jow-jow ju…ôn-i -taj-wan-ju…ôn- ¶u-min s- ¶j…ô ¶uŇč na pow-wu-kuaŇč"****, siŇč- ¶Ňč-ju…ôn ju…ôn- ¶u-min- ¶u w…ô-ju…ôn-ńßw…ô ¶u-paŇč) kuaŇč-kuaŇč ssaan …ĺmigaw ¶jo-…ĺjaw-si sapańß nkija kndkilan. ¶jo-…ĺjaw-si ga plalaj ńßaŇčan na " pow-taŇč-si", ssmikul jajuŇč nkija kndkilan ka ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč kuŇč sjwo nil un-pi s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč sj…ô-ńßw…ô, jajuŇč nii ga ini bi k…ĺu ¶iq na, daja jajuŇč niqan dńßa ka tglaq ¶ńßu-nju, mtasaw ni …ôgu bi qsija jajuŇč, malu nniqan qsu…ĺux ku-ńßua ni si- k…ô, …ôgu bi ¶ńß…ô-wu ka ssijaw ni mtasaw qsija jajuŇč, tduwa jańßun tnsapańß mkksa jajuŇč skbijax ńßiji, m…ĺigaw mkksa ŇčaŇču ¶, qmlańßaŇč nkija kndkilan ni …ĺmigaw msaŇčaj, malu ssaan kuaŇč-kuaŇč …ĺmigaw. ijux qmlańßaŇč jajuŇč qsu…ĺux dpun ka ¶jo-…ĺjaw-si. jasa sdalińß ju-…ĺan ¶un s…ô- ¶ju niqan s…ô…ô…üiq msa " ju-…ĺan pu-taw" u…ĺi. taj-ja ta- ¶aw taj-ja ta- ¶aw plalaj ńßaŇčan na o " tan-lun ta ¶aw", mlutu ¶ kska ńßakaw i-…ĺan-s…ôn saŇč-siŇč- sjaŇč tan-soŇč-pi ni ta-tuŇč sjaŇč lun-pi ¶un ka duŇčus na, kija ni pńßiju ńßakaw nii pusu duŇčus, ijux gm…ĺana kmalu ga mniq ta-tuŇč-sjaŇč tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq musa …ĺwo-doŇč s…ô- ¶ju, bukuj taj-ja ta- ¶aw kp…ĺuńßun ka ńßaŇčan na. ńßnijgan taj-ja ta- ¶aw sluwan malu qtaan, bu…üi samaw ńßnijgan, …ĺakaw pa ¶iŇč dow…ĺiq, p…ĺana pusu …ĺakaw niqan …ômbanańß, msaas, mgdxgal, niqan bi tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq qtaan. qtaan bnatas patas ("jow-jow ju…ôn-i -taj-wan-ju…ôn- ¶u-min s- ¶j…ô ¶uŇč na pow-wu-kuaŇč"****, siŇč- ¶Ňč-ju…ôn ju…ôn- ¶u-min- ¶u w…ô-ju…ôn-ńßw…ô ¶u-paŇč) taj-wan pu-…ĺow-sjun- ¶i i-…ĺan …ĺju-jow-wan
